title: Gate corelib lowering on Linux and fix graph Std shard expectations

source.subject: fix(ci): update graph Std shard expectations and gate corelib lowering on Linux

body:
## Outcome

Update graph Std shard expectations and gate corelib lowering on Linux.

## Context

- Workstream **ci-release** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **CI workflows and deploy infra** (`v02-ci-deploy-infra`).
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`3cd4c93`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/3cd4c93) — fix(ci): update graph Std shard expectations and gate corelib lowering on Linux
